name: Olenna Table Lamp - 29.5 Inch Height - TBL4298 - Gold/White - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Olenna table lamp. Standing at 29.5 inches, this elegant piece features a captivating blend of gold and white that enriches any decor. Its polyresin body is composed of 60 percent resin, providing a distinct texture, while the 20 percent marble base offers sturdy support. The iron neck, also contributing 20 percent to the piece, adds a refined touch. Whether it's in your living room or bedroom, the Olenna lamp delivers a warm glow that enhances your space. Designed with an E26 socket, it makes a stylish and functional addition to any setting. Add a touch of grace to your home with the Olenna lamp and enjoy its timeless charm.
